check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Microsoft Office 2016 >> Security Settings >> Disable all Trust Bar notifications for security issues is set to "Disabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\common\trustcenter

If the value trustbar is REG_DWORD = 0, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Office 2016 >> Security Settings "Disable all Trust Bar notifications for security issues" to "Disabled".
title: Trust Bar notifications must be configured to display information in the Message Bar about the content that has been automatically blocked.
